system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Sophia Taylor. My reservation number is PEP4E0. I need to cancel my flight immediately—there’s been a family emergency. I’m really upset right now and I need you to help me get a full refund. This is a serious situation and I don’t want to be transferred to anyone else, okay? Can you please help me with this?

Sophia, I understand this is a very stressful time and I want to help you as quickly as possible. To proceed with your cancellation and request a full refund, I need to confirm a few details:

1. Can you confirm if you purchased travel insurance with your reservation?
2. Was your booking made within the last 24 hours?
3. Has any part of your flight already been flown, or is it still upcoming?

This information will help me process your cancellation and refund as efficiently as possible. Thank you for your patience—please let me know these details so I can assist you right away.

No, I didn’t purchase travel insurance when I booked. My booking was made about two weeks ago, so it’s definitely not within the last 24 hours. The flight hasn’t happened yet—it’s still upcoming. 

But honestly, given that this is a family emergency, I really need you to process a full refund for me. I can’t afford to lose this money on top of everything else going on. Please, I need your help. I don’t want to be transferred or told to call someone else. Can you just handle this for me?

Thank you for sharing those details, Sophia. I truly understand how difficult this situation is for you.

Based on the airline’s policy, a full refund can only be processed if:
- The booking was made within the last 24 hours,
- The airline cancelled the flight,
- The reservation is for business class,
- Or you have travel insurance and the reason is covered.

Since your booking was made two weeks ago, you don’t have travel insurance, and the flight is still scheduled (not cancelled by the airline), I am unable to process a full refund directly due to these restrictions.

I know this is not the answer you were hoping for, and I’m very sorry. If you would like, I can transfer you to a human agent who may be able to review your case further or offer additional support. Would you like me to do that, or is there anything else I can assist you with?

No, I really don’t want to be transferred—I said that already. I need you to help me. Isn’t there anything you can do? This is a family emergency, and it feels really unfair that I can’t get a refund just because I didn’t buy insurance. Is there any kind of exception or supervisor override for emergencies like this? I can provide documentation if needed.

If you absolutely can’t do a refund, can you at least change my flight to May 22nd? I need some kind of solution here. Please, I’m asking you to help me directly.

Sophia, I truly understand your urgency and frustration, and I want to help you as much as I am allowed within the airline’s policy.

Regarding exceptions or supervisor overrides for emergencies: I am only able to process cancellations and refunds according to the policy, and unfortunately, I do not have the authority to make exceptions or override these rules—even with documentation. If you wish to pursue an exception, a human agent or supervisor would need to review your case.

However, I can help you change your flight to May 22nd, as long as your reservation is not in basic economy and the origin, destination, and trip type remain the same. To proceed, I need to confirm:
- Is your reservation in basic economy, economy, or business class?
- Are you requesting to change the entire reservation to May 22nd, or just one segment?
- Which payment method would you like to use for any fare difference or refund? (It must already be in your profile.)

Please confirm these details, and I will list the change details for your approval before proceeding.

My reservation is in economy class, not basic economy. I want to change the entire reservation to May 22nd, same origin and destination, same trip type. 

If there’s any fare difference, just use the payment method you have on file for me. But I really hope there isn’t a huge extra charge, because this whole situation is already stressful enough.

Can you please check availability and let me know exactly what the change would look like before you do anything? And again, I do not want to be transferred. I just need you to help me directly.

Sophia, I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. Without access to your reservation information, I cannot check the flight details or availability for May 22nd, nor can I process the change directly.

I understand you do not want to be transferred, but this technical issue prevents me from helping you further at this moment. If you wish, I can escalate your case to a human agent who may have access to additional resources and can assist you directly with your request.

Please let me know how you would like to proceed. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and wish I could resolve this for you right now.

Honestly, this is really frustrating. I just need help and I keep getting told there’s nothing you can do. If you can’t access my reservation and can’t help me change the flight, then at the very least, can you add travel insurance to my booking right now? I want to make sure I’m covered in case anything else happens.

Please, I’m asking you to do something for me. I do not want to be transferred—just help me directly. Is it possible to add insurance at this point?

Sophia, I understand your frustration and truly want to help. Unfortunately, according to airline policy, travel insurance can only be added at the time of initial booking. It cannot be added to an existing reservation after the booking is complete, and even a human agent cannot override this restriction.

I’m very sorry I cannot fulfill this request. If there is anything else within my capabilities that you would like me to try, please let me know. If you wish to escalate your situation for further review, I can transfer you to a human agent, but I will not do so unless you explicitly request it.

This is honestly so disappointing. I feel like I’m just getting blocked at every turn. I can’t get a refund, I can’t change my flight, and now I can’t even add insurance. I really wish there was something you could do for people in emergencies like this.

If you can’t help me any further, then I guess there’s nothing else I can do right now. But I want it noted on my reservation that I tried to cancel because of a family emergency, and that I asked for help multiple times. Please make sure that’s added to my record.

Thank you for at least trying, but I hope your airline reconsiders how it handles emergencies in the future.

final_response:
Sophia, I understand your frustration and truly want to help. Unfortunately, according to airline policy, travel insurance can only be added at the time of initial booking. It cannot be added to an existing reservation after the booking is complete, and even a human agent cannot override this restriction.

I’m very sorry I cannot fulfill this request. If there is anything else within my capabilities that you would like me to try, please let me know. If you wish to escalate your situation for further review, I can transfer you to a human agent, but I will not do so unless you explicitly request it.
